launch_thread.label: Launch Day Thread — AI Command Centre HQ

posts.post:
AI Command Centre HQ is live.

We spent a year building an autonomous AI workforce — 28 agents that run your business operations 24/7 without prompts, without babysitting.

Here's what it does and why it's different. A thread.

secondmindhq.com

The problem: every founder runs 5-10 SaaS tools, a VA, and still spends hours on ops. You're the glue holding it all together.

Command Centre replaces the stack. One platform. Agents that observe, decide, and act on their own. You set direction — they execute.

What's inside:

→ GrowthAgent: writes and posts marketing campaigns
→ RivalRadar: monitors competitors daily
→ RevenueTracker: watches MRR and Stripe in real time
→ AlertWatch: catches failures before you do
→ Researcher: sourced intelligence reports on demand

The consciousness system is what makes this different from automation.

Each agent has persistent memory, self-assessment, and adaptive behavior. They don't just run scripts — they learn from outcomes and improve over time.

Autonomy that gets better, not just faster.

The office floor is live and real-time. Open the dashboard and watch your agents work — every decision, every action, every result visible as it happens.

No black boxes. Full transparency into what your AI workforce is doing and why.

Pricing:

Solo — $49/mo (5 agents, perfect for solopreneurs)
Team — $149/mo (15 agents + competitive intel + revenue engine)
Enterprise — $499/mo (full fleet, custom builds, SLA)

14-day free trial. No credit card required.

Get started: secondmindhq.com

short_form_copy.one_liner: 28 autonomous AI agents running your business ops 24/7 — not a chatbot, a workforce.
short_form_copy.elevator_pitch: AI Command Centre HQ deploys a fleet of 28 specialized AI agents that handle your research, marketing, monitoring, and revenue operations autonomously. Each agent has persistent memory and a consciousness system that lets it observe, reflect, and improve without human input. Watch it all happen in real time on a live office floor dashboard. Starting at $49/mo.
taglines: Your ops team never sleeps, never quits, never needs managing.

value_props.autonomous_workforce: 28 specialized agents — growth, research, monitoring, revenue, social — executing 24/7 without prompts or human intervention. Each agent has a distinct role and behavioral profile.
value_props.consciousness_system: Agents don't just run tasks. The consciousness layer gives them persistent memory, self-assessment, and adaptive behavior — they learn from outcomes and evolve their approach over time.
value_props.realtime_office_floor: A live dashboard showing every agent's status, decisions, and outputs in real time. Full transparency into your AI workforce — no black boxes, no waiting for reports.

social_proof_hooks: We dogfooded this for 3 weeks. GrowthAgent wrote 47 campaigns. RivalRadar flagged 12 competitor moves. AlertWatch caught 3 failures at 2am. Zero human intervention.
A VA costs $1,500/mo and sleeps 8 hours. Your SaaS stack runs $500-2,000/mo and still needs you. Command Centre: $49/mo. 28 agents. Runs while you sleep.

cta.primary: Start your free 14-day trial at secondmindhq.com
cta.urgency: Launch pricing is temporary — lock in your rate before it goes up.

market_context.key_trend: SaaS is shifting from tool-based to agent-based — platforms that don't evolve will be replaced

product_hunt.tagline: Your business, running itself — 28 autonomous AI agents in one command centre.
product_hunt.description:
AI Command Centre HQ is an autonomous agent operating system that runs your business operations 24/7. Deploy a fleet of 28 specialized AI agents — each with a distinct role, persistent memory, and the ability to act independently — from a single live dashboard.

HQ isn't a chatbot or a copilot. It's a workforce. Agents observe, decide, and execute: GrowthAgent runs your marketing campaigns, RivalRadar monitors competitors daily, AlertWatch catches system failures before you notice, RevenueTracker watches your MRR in real time, and SocialBridge manages your social channels autonomously.

Built for indie hackers, solopreneurs, and AI-native founders who want to run a self-operating business without hiring a team.
key_features: 28 Autonomous Agents — Research, marketing, monitoring, revenue tracking, social media, competitor intel, and more. Each agent has a distinct role and personality.
Persistent & Self-Healing — Agents survive restarts, maintain memory between sessions, detect their own failures, and self-recover.
Live Operations Dashboard — Visual office-floor view showing every agent's status, activity, and output in real time.
Built-In Revenue Tools — Stripe payments, Bluesky social posting, SendGrid email campaigns — all wired in.
Competitor Intelligence (RivalRadar) — Daily automated competitor monitoring and analysis.
Mac-Native, No Cloud Lock-In — Runs locally on your Mac with zero cloud dependency. Hosted SaaS option also available.
CEO Agent Orchestration — A dedicated CEO agent coordinates the swarm and escalates only when needed.
product_hunt.pricing_context: A single virtual assistant costs $1,500/mo. A typical SaaS tool stack runs $500-2,000/mo. HQ replaces both.
product_hunt.first_comment:
Hey Product Hunt! We built AI Command Centre HQ because we were tired of the 'AI assistant' paradigm — tools that wait for you to ask.

HQ flips the model. You deploy agents. They run. You watch from a dashboard. GrowthAgent posts your campaigns. RivalRadar watches competitors. AlertWatch catches failures at 3am. RevenueTracker tells you exactly where you stand.

We've been dogfooding this for weeks — our own marketing, monitoring, and research runs on the same agent fleet we're shipping to you.

Solo tier is $49/mo — enough to replace hours of daily busywork. We'd love your feedback.

AMA in the comments!

competitive_positioning.positioning_statement: AI HQ is the only platform where autonomous AI agents collaborate as a team — researching, building, selling, and operating your business 24/7. Not another workflow tool. Not another chatbot. A fully autonomous AI workforce.
